description: This file implements an in-memory repository for managing personas, including CRUD operations, versioning, and draft/final state management, for a software project.

methods.name: createPersona
methods.description: Creates a new persona with optional initial JSON data, assigns a UUID, and initializes versioning.

methods.name: getPersonaById
methods.description: Fetches a persona by its ID, returns null if not found.

methods.name: updatePersona
methods.description: Updates persona metadata such as title, returns the updated persona or null if not found.

methods.name: createPersonaVersion
methods.description: Creates a new version of a persona, auto-incrementing version if not specified.

methods.name: listPersonaVersions
methods.description: Lists all versions of a persona in ascending order.

methods.name: getLatestPersonaVersion
methods.description: Retrieves the most recent version of a persona.

methods.name: saveDraft
methods.description: Saves a draft JSON blob for a persona in-memory.

methods.name: getDraft
methods.description: Retrieves the latest saved draft for a persona.

methods.name: saveFinal
methods.description: Saves a final JSON blob for a persona in-memory.

methods.name: getFinal
methods.description: Retrieves the saved final JSON blob for a persona.
